scripts.build: pnpm run generate:static-config && pnpm run prepare:deps && vite build
scripts.dev: pnpm run generate:static-config && pnpm run prepare:deps && sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; exec vite "$@"' sh
scripts.release:check: pnpm run check:static-config && pnpm run build && node scripts/verify-static-dist.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm run generate:static-config && pnpm run prepare:deps && vitest run --coverage
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run generate:static-config && pnpm run prepare:deps && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
